title: quercus × celtica
intro: Quercus × celtica, also known as the hybrid of English oak (Quercus robur) and sessile oak (Quercus petraea), is a rare and unique plant species. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high tannin content, which has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus × celtica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Quercus × celtica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
